title: Grid Balancing and Demand Response
description: Flexible mining loads can curtail or ramp based on grid conditions and price signals. This introduces potential value in balancing intermittent generation and constrained transmission.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Mining
resources.notes: Miner operating constraints that shape responsiveness to power prices.

resources.notes: Operational references including discussions of power-market dynamics.
